instructions:
This is a creative portfolio project with two distinct parts:

## Frontend (React + Three.js)
- React 19, React Router 7, Vite 7, Tailwind CSS 3.4
- Three.js 0.180 for 3D WebGL scenes; p5.js 2.2 for generative coding
- GLSL shaders imported via vite-plugin-glsl
- Three.js follows an Experience → World → Objects layered pattern
- Entry: src/main.jsx → src/App.jsx (routes) → pages → useWorld.jsx hook → Experience class
- Shader registry: world/shaderTestWorld/shaderConfig.js (17+ shaders)
- State: Zustand stores in src/store/
- No TypeScript — pure JSX

## Backend (Go REST API)
- Go 1.25.1, Chi v5 router, PostgreSQL 16 (Docker, port 5433)
- Entry: server/cmd/main.go + server/cmd/api.go
- Auth: stateless JWT (HS256, 1hr expiry) stored in HttpOnly cookie named 'session'
- Handlers use the closure/dependency injection pattern — outer fn captures deps, returns http.HandlerFunc
- All handlers depend on the UserRepository interface (not *sql.DB directly) — enables mock-based unit tests
- Middleware: RequireAuth reads/validates JWT cookie, stores userID in typed context key; RequireAdmin checks user.IsAdmin
- Password: bcrypt at DefaultCost
- No ORM — raw database/sql queries
- Integration tests use testcontainers-go (build tag: integration)

## Key files
- docs/backend-architecture.md — full backend reference
- docs/architecture.md — Three.js / p5.js frontend architecture
- docs/phase2-backend.md — Go learning notes, auth flow walkthrough
- server/internal/handlers/handlers.md — handler docs
- server/internal/middleware/middleware.md — middleware docs
- server/internal/repos/repos.md — repository layer docs
- server/Makefile — docker-up, docker-down, db-create, dev
- .env.local (not committed) — PORT, DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, FRONTEND_URL, APP_ENV

## Conventions
- Backend errors are always JSON: {"error": "..."} via json.WriteError
- ErrNotFound sentinel in repos — callers use errors.Is(err, repos.ErrNotFound)
- Context key for userID is a typed contextKey string to prevent collisions
- Production cookies: SameSite=None + Secure=true (when APP_ENV=production)
- CORS: exact FRONTEND_URL origin only (no wildcards — required for AllowCredentials:true)

## Running locally
- Frontend: npm run dev (port 5173)
- Backend: cd server && make docker-up && make dev (port 8080)
- Full stack: npm run full-stack
- Integration tests: go test -tags integration ./cmd/ (from server/)
